title: Authentication Context Contract
purpose: Establish a canonical authenticated request shape (AuthContext) before API routes proliferate. Prevents auth semantics drift across middleware, routes, workers, webhooks, and internal services.
architectural_constraints: AuthContext is the ONLY type used to represent an authenticated actor
No Supabase SDK types leak into AuthContext
AuthContext supports human users, service accounts, and future machine actors
Correlation ID and traceparent always present
Declared via global augmentation or explicit wrapper, not ambient any

deliverables.description: Express Request augmentation for auth context
Unit tests for context construction and validation

acceptance_criteria: AuthContext contains: userId, authProvider, authProviderUserId, email, roles, correlationId, traceparent?
Express Request interface extended with optional auth: AuthContext
Factory function creates AuthContext from verified JWT payload

traceability.description: Created AuthContext contract with userId, authProvider, email, roles, correlationId, traceparent. Express Request augmentation. Factory function from VerifiedToken. Role helpers hasRole/requireRole. No Supabase types leaked.

failure_modes.mitigation: Factory throws domain error with clear message
